search.title: User search
search.subtitle: Find a user to view or impersonate. Platform admins cannot be impersonated.
search.label: Търсене by name, email, or ULID
search.load_failed: We couldn't search users. Моля try again.

impersonate.title: Impersonate {name}
impersonate.warning: You will open a new tab signed in AS this user. Your admin session stays active here. Every action you take is recorded against this user with you logged as the impersonator, and the session expires automatically.
impersonate.reason_hint: Задължително, at least {count} characters. Recorded in the audit log.
impersonate.success: Имперсониране от {name} started in a new tab.
impersonate.failed: We couldn't start impersonation. Моля try again.

impersonation_log.title: Имперсониране log
impersonation_log.subtitle: Every admin impersonation session ever started, newest first.
impersonation_log.empty: Не impersonation sessions match these filters.
impersonation_log.load_failed: We couldn't load the impersonation log. Моля refresh.

impersonation.already_active: You already have an active impersonation. End it before starting another.
impersonation.invalid_handoff: This impersonation hand-отf is invalid, already used, or expired.
